description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical top hat with a flat crown and a wide, flat brim. The main body of the hat is a dark charcoal color, while the brim and a wide band around the base are a deep brown, giving it a classic Victorian appearance. The band features a prominent rectangular buckle at the front, which appears to have a subtle embossed design, possibly a skull motif. The stitching around the brim and along the vertical seams of the crown is visible, adding a handcrafted, detailed touch. The surface of the hat looks like a textured fabric, likely felt or wool, with the band possibly made of grosgrain or leather. This hat would be suitable for formal or period-themed urban settings, such as parades, costume events, or theatrical performances.
description: A tall, dark charcoal top hat with a wide brown brim and a decorative band featuring a buckle. Visible stitching and textured fabric give it a classic, Victorian look.
description_view_0: The hat is seen from the back, showing the tall crown, brown band, and wide brim with visible stitching.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the rectangular buckle with an embossed design on the brown band, centered above the brim.
description_view_2: The rear view displays vertical stitched seams on the crown and the continuous brown band around the base.
description_view_3: A side view of the hat, showing the uninterrupted brown band and the wide, stitched brim.
attribute_brim_style: wide and flat with visible stitching
attribute_crown_shape: tall and cylindrical with a flat top
